creator: des@yes.no
text:
Various ports (java/jsdk, databases/postgresql with USE_JDBC) install
Java libraries in various places, making it hard for the user to find
them once they're installed.

Fix: 

Standardize on a single location for Java libraries (e.g.
${PREFIX}/share/java/classes).
How-To-Repeat: 
Install various ports which include Java libraries (.jar files).
